checkout.zelle_processed_message: We have received your Zelle payment receipt and our team is reviewing it.
checkout.what_happens_now_message: Our team is verifying your receipt. This process can take up to 48 business hours to complete.
checkout.confirmation_message: As soon as the payment is confirmed, you will receive an email with the next steps to start the visa process.
checkout.need_help_message: If you have any questions or need support, please contact us through our contact page.

completed.title: Process Completed!
completed.subtitle: Congratulations! Your application process is complete. The team will be in touch with next steps.

survey_completion.title: Profile submitted successfully!
survey_completion.subtitle: Your profile has been forwarded to
survey_completion.sevis_context: SEVIS is the U.S. government system used by DHS to track certified schools and F-1 students. This number represents the official pool of DHS SEVIS-certified institutions considered for your profile.
survey_completion.name: Name
survey_completion.feedback_desc: You will know which universities have pre-accepted your application.
survey_completion.contract_approved_desc: Your approval has been confirmed. College selection unlocks after the 24-hour university review window.
survey_completion.profile_review_desc: Our team is reviewing your documents. Your college access will be released after the 24-hour profile review.

selection_fee.processing_desc: We received your payment receipt and it is currently being verified by our financial team.
selection_fee.time_notice: This process may take up to 48 business hours.
selection_fee.payment_confirmed_desc: Your Selection Process Fee of $400 has been received. Let's continue your journey to study in the USA.
selection_fee.pending_fee_desc: The Selection Process Fee of $400 has not been confirmed yet. Please complete the payment to continue.

identity.title: Profile Details
identity.subtitle: Fill in all the information below to continue.
identity.already_verified_desc: Your details have already been registered.

documents.title: Document Upload
documents.subtitle: Upload the required documents to continue.
documents.subtitle_main: Upload the required documents to continue.
documents.file_requirements: Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG or WEBP. Maximum size: 20MB per file.
documents.passport_desc: Upload a clear photo or scan of your passport (biographical page).
documents.i20_desc: Copy of your current I-20 from your previous institution.
documents.i797a_desc: Change of status approval notice, if applicable to your case.
documents.visa_desc: Copy of your F-1 visa in your passport.
documents.diploma_desc: Upload your high school diploma or equivalent certificate.
documents.funds_desc: Bank statements showing minimum $22,000 USD (+ $5,000 per dependent).
documents.address_us_desc: Proof of address (recent bill or correspondence).
documents.address_br_desc: Your complete residential address in Brazil.
documents.locked_notice: Documents submitted and locked for review.
documents.error_type: Only PDF, JPG, PNG or WEBP files are accepted.
documents.error_all_required: Upload all required documents before continuing.
documents.error_upload_doc: Error uploading document. Please try again.
documents.error_select_files: Select at least one file before continuing.
documents.rejected_notice: One or more documents need correction. Upload the rejected files again for review.
documents.bank_statement_notice_desc: The Bank Statement is NOT the amount you will spend. It is only proof for immigration that you have financial capacity. It can be: checking account, savings, investments, family or sponsor account, or a combination of accounts.
documents.bank_statement_notice_help: If you need help understanding this document, speak with your consultant.

process_type.error_select: Please select your process type to continue.

scholarship.error_save: Error saving selection. Please try again.
scholarship.instruction_filter: Use filters to search by university, area, or academic level

scholarship.approval_estimate: Estimated approval: up to 48 business hours

scholarship.final_choice_note: You can still remove or adjust universities on this screen. The definitive confirmation happens only after the final confirmation modal.
scholarship.confirm_modal_desc: By confirming, you will no longer be able to change the selected universities. Review carefully before proceeding.
scholarship.bank_statement_desc: The Bank Statement is NOT the amount you will spend. It is only financial proof required by U.S. immigration for your I-20 issuance. You do not need to transfer this amount to the university or to Migma.
scholarship.selectable_count: {{count}} currently selectable with published scholarship levels
scholarship.no_university_found_desc: Try adjusting your filters to see more options.

scholarship.limit_reached_remove_one: Limit reached. Remove one university to select another.

payment.title: Application Fee
payment.subtitle: Pay the application fee to submit your scholarship application.
payment.paid_desc: Your application fee has been confirmed.
payment.already_paid_desc: Your application fee has been confirmed. You can now proceed to the Dashboard.
payment.secure: Secure payment processed by Stripe. Your card data is never stored.
payment.contact_advisor: Contact your advisor to complete this payment.
payment.no_university_selected_desc: You have not chosen a university or scholarship yet. Please go back to the previous step and select one before continuing with payment.

placement_fee.title: Placement Fee
placement_fee.subtitle: The Placement Fee is 20% of your scholarship's annual value. This covers the full placement service until your university acceptance.
placement_fee.paid_desc: Your Placement Fee has been confirmed. Our team will now process your application.
placement_fee.secure: Secure payment processed by Stripe. Your card data is never stored.

placement_fee.no_applications_select_first: No approved applications found. Select a university first.
placement_fee.full_scholarship_confirmed: Your scholarship at {{university}} has been confirmed.
placement_fee.profile_review_desc: Your university selection has been sent for review. We will notify you when it is approved for payment.
placement_fee.approval_time: Estimated approval time: up to 24 hours
placement_fee.subtitle_calc_selected: Confirm your scholarship by paying the placement fee for the selected university.
placement_fee.installments_notice: You pay ${{first}} now and ${{second}} after the acceptance letter is issued. The acceptance letter will only be released after payment of the 2nd installment.
placement_fee.zero_fee_pending_desc: This scholarship has no Placement Fee. Our team will confirm the waiver and your onboarding will advance automatically once approved.

waiting.subtitle: Our team is working on your applications. We'll notify you with updates.

waiting.docs_under_review_desc: Your documents are being reviewed by our team. This typically takes 3-5 business days.
waiting.deadline_passed_transfer: Transfer deadline has passed. Contact your advisor immediately.

waiting.docs_review_desc: Your documents are being reviewed by our team. This typically takes 3-5 business days.
waiting.passport_previous_step_note: Passport appears in the previous step and can be updated there.

university_modal.course_note: * Scholarships displayed below change according to the selected course.
university_modal.scholarship_level_desc: The higher the Placement Fee you pay now, the lower your annual tuition will be throughout the course.
university_modal.no_scholarship_levels: No scholarship levels registered for this institution.
university_modal.savings_sentence: If you study for <years>{{years}} years</years>, you save <amount>{{amount}}</amount> compared to full tuition.
university_modal.placement_fee_guarantee: Placement Fee - secures your scholarship and seat
university_modal.i20_application_fee_desc: I-20 / Application Fee - required to issue the I-20
university_modal.when_start_course: When Starting the Course - One-time fee
university_modal.tuition_installments_desc: Structured in 12 monthly installments by the university
university_modal.first_year_estimate: Estimated investment in the full first year:
university_modal.cpt_available_day_one: available from the 1st day of class
university_modal.cpt_desc: Authorization to work during the course - {{cpt}}
university_modal.opt_desc: Post-graduation authorization: 1 standard year (3 years for STEM courses)
university_modal.req_gpa: Minimum GPA 2.0 - transcript or equivalent (as evaluated by the university)
university_modal.req_english: English proficiency - TOEFL, IELTS, Duolingo or interview with the academic director
university_modal.req_documents: Documentation - valid passport, diplomas and previous transcripts
university_modal.faq_placement_a: It is a one-time investment to secure your scholarship and seat at the university. The higher the Placement Fee paid now, the lower your annual tuition will be throughout the course.
university_modal.faq_cpt_opt_a: CPT is authorization to work in your field during the course. OPT is authorization to work after graduation - 1 standard year or up to 3 years for STEM courses.
university_modal.faq_change_q: Can I change my scholarship later?
university_modal.faq_change_a: No. The scholarship level choice is final after confirmation. Review the savings calculator carefully before confirming.
university_modal.faq_rejected_q: What happens if I am not approved?
university_modal.faq_rejected_a: If you are not accepted by any Migma partner university, the selection process fee will be fully refunded according to our refund guarantee.
university_modal.referral_desc: Refer 10 enrolled people and your tuition drops to $3,800/year for the rest of the course - a major long-term saving.

acceptance_letter.second_installment_pending_desc: Your Placement Fee was paid in 2 installments. The 2nd installment is still pending. After payment confirmation, your acceptance letter will be released automatically.

acceptance_letter.letter_available_desc: Your acceptance letter was issued by the university. Download it below.
acceptance_letter.i20_processing_desc: As soon as the university issues your I-20 and Acceptance Letter, you will be notified by email and WhatsApp.

tour.prompt_title: Want a quick tour of your dashboard?
tour.prompt_description: In under a minute, we will show you where to track your process, documents, forms, referrals, and support.

sidebar.title: Your portal menu
sidebar.description: Use this menu to move between every area of your Migma process.

navigation.title: Main sections
navigation.description: Each tab groups one part of your journey: applications, documents, forms, referrals, support, and profile.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: This is where you see your journey summary, current step, and what needs attention now.

progress.title: Process progress
progress.description: This indicator shows how much of the process is complete and which step is active.

next_action.title: Next action
next_action.description: This button takes you straight to the most important action right now.

applications.title: My applications
applications.description: Track universities, scholarships, payments, approved documents, and the final package.

documents.title: Pending documents
documents.description: See requested documents, upload files, and follow the team's review.

supplemental_data.title: Supplemental data
supplemental_data.description: Fill in information used in university forms and your application package.

forms.title: Forms to sign
forms.description: Review and digitally sign the forms generated for your process.

rewards.title: Referral program
rewards.description: Share your link, track referrals, and follow your progress toward the benefit.

support.title: Support
support.description: Open support whenever you need help with the process, documents, payments, or next steps.

preferences.title: Portal preferences
preferences.description: Here you can replay this tour, switch theme, and change the dashboard language.

profile.title: Profile status
profile.description: Keep your personal and academic data complete to avoid delays in the process.

page.title: My applications
page.description: This tab gathers all your applications and shows each university's progress in the process.

kpis.title: Application summary
kpis.description: Use these indicators to quickly see how many applications exist, how many were approved, and how many still need attention.

card.title: University details
card.description: Each card shows the university, scholarship, placement fee, annual tuition, and application date.

progress.title: Application stages
progress.description: Here you track scholarship approval, Placement Fee payment, documents, and signed forms.

empty.title: No applications yet
empty.description: When you select universities and scholarships, they will appear here for tracking.

page.title: Pending documents
page.description: This tab shows the documents requested by Migma or by the system to complete your process.

kpis.title: Document summary
kpis.description: Track how many documents were requested, submitted, approved, and how many still need attention.

finals.title: Final documents
finals.description: When an acceptance letter or transfer form is available, it appears at the top of this list.

card.title: Requested document
card.description: Each card shows the document type, important dates, pending issues, and review status.

status.title: Upload and review status
status.description: Use these indicators to know whether the file was uploaded and whether the team has approved it.

actions.title: Upload or resend file
actions.description: Use this area to upload the document or resend a corrected version when needed.

empty.title: No documents requested
empty.description: When new documents are needed, they will appear here for upload and tracking.

page.title: Supplemental data
page.description: This tab gathers information used to fill university forms and complete your application package.

empty.title: Pending completion
empty.description: When your supplemental data has not been submitted yet, start with this button to open the form.

edit_action.title: Edit data
edit_action.description: Use this action to fill in or update the information whenever needed.

emergency.title: Emergency contact
emergency.description: Provide a trusted person who can be contacted during the process if needed.

sponsor.title: Financial sponsor
sponsor.description: This is where financial information used in university forms and proof documents is kept.

recommenders.title: Recommenders
recommenders.description: Add people who can support recommendation letters or confirm academic/professional information.

save_actions.title: Save changes
save_actions.description: After reviewing everything, save to update the dashboard and make this data available for the next steps.

page.title: Forms to sign
page.description: This tab gathers the forms generated for your process and shows what still needs a signature.

kpis.title: Forms summary
kpis.description: See how many forms were generated, how many were signed, and how many are still pending.

card.title: Generated form
card.description: Each card represents a university form or a final package form for your process.

status.title: Form status
status.description: Here you can check whether the form has been signed and when it was generated or completed.

actions.title: Review, open, and sign
actions.description: Use these buttons to review the PDF, open the file, and start the digital signature when available.

empty.title: No forms generated
empty.description: Forms appear here after the process allows the package to be generated for signature.

page.title: Referral program
page.description: This tab shows your referral link, goal progress, and appointments generated by your referrals.

kpis.title: Referral summary
kpis.description: Track how many closures you have, how many clicks the link received, and how many meetings were scheduled.

progress.title: Goal progress
progress.description: Here you can see what is still missing to reach the program benefit and whether the goal is already complete.

code.title: Unique code
code.description: This code identifies your referrals and follows the lead from scheduling through closing.

link.title: Referral link
link.description: Share this link with people who want to study in the US so the system registers the referral under your name.

share_actions.title: Share link
share_actions.description: Use these buttons to copy the link, send it through WhatsApp, email it, or open the referral page.

how.title: How it works
how.description: This block summarizes the program steps, from sharing to benefit application.

meetings.title: Recent appointments
meetings.description: This is where leads that arrived through your link appear, with meeting or closing status.

meetings_empty.title: No appointments yet
meetings_empty.description: When someone schedules using your link, the record will appear in this area.

lead.title: Referred lead
lead.description: Each record shows the person's main information, date, and status inside the program.

page.title: Migma support
page.description: This tab centralizes your conversations with the Migma Team and helps answer questions about the process, documents, and next steps.

header.title: Support channel
header.description: At the top you can see whether you are speaking with automated support or whether the case has already been transferred to a specialist.

status.title: Support status
status.description: This indicator shows whether support is online or whether you are waiting for human assistance.

message.title: Conversation history
message.description: Responses and guidance stay recorded here so you can track what has already been handled.

handoff.title: Human assistance
handoff.description: When the AI identifies that a specialist is needed, this area shows the handoff and next steps.

schedule.title: Mentor schedule
schedule.description: If times are available, choose a slot to speak with the team through Google Meet.

composer.title: Send a message
composer.description: Use this field to write your question. The history is used to keep support context.

send.title: Send to support
send.description: After writing, send your message to receive a response or handoff.

page.title: Student profile
page.description: This tab gathers personal, academic, and account data used to keep your process moving without delays.

header.title: Profile summary
header.description: Here you identify the profile area and quickly access data updates.

edit_action.title: Edit profile
edit_action.description: Use this button to return to onboarding and correct or complete important information.

personal.title: Personal information
personal.description: Review name, email, phone, country, document, and nationality used in your process.

academic.title: Academic information
academic.description: This area shows interests, education, process type, and English level used to guide the application.

completion.title: Profile completion
completion.description: Track the completion percentage and see whether anything is still pending.

missing.title: Pending data
missing.description: When there are pending items, this list shows what needs to be completed to avoid process blocks.

complete.title: Complete profile
complete.description: When everything is filled in, this confirmation shows the profile is ready for the next uses.

account.title: Account information
account.description: Operational details such as membership time, document status, dependents, and completion are shown here.

rewards.title: Referral Program
rewards.subtitle: Share your link, track appointments and see your closed referrals.
rewards.share_text: I want to refer you to Migma to study in the USA. Schedule a conversation here: {{url}}
rewards.progress_desc: 10 closed referrals reduce the reference tuition to {{tuition}} and waive the Migma monthly fee.
rewards.progress_reached_date: Goal reached on {{date}}. Benefit applied with reference of
rewards.progress_reached: Goal reached. Your Migma monthly fee was waived and the reference tuition is {{tuition}}.
rewards.progress_missing: {{remaining}} closed referral(s) missing to reach the benefit.
rewards.code_desc: The link leads to the scheduling page and keeps the referrer's code on the lead.
rewards.how_step1: Share your link with friends who want to study in the US.
rewards.how_step2: The lead schedules a meeting and the system preserves your referral code.
rewards.how_step3: When the CRM marks the lead as closed, your counter goes up in real-time.
rewards.how_step4: With {{goal}} closures, your Migma monthly fee is waived and the tuition reference becomes {{tuition}}.
rewards.meetings_empty_desc: When someone schedules using your link, the record will appear here.
rewards.celebration_desc: Your Migma monthly fee is waived and your tuition reference is now {{tuition}}/year. Congratulations!

step.1_desc: This fee covers the processing of your application, document evaluation, and initial support for your study process.
step.2_desc: Complete your answers so the Migma team can direct your application to the best scholarship options.
step.3_desc: Choose your university and scholarship options for the Migma team's analysis.
step.4_desc: Your selection is under review. Track the approved application status here.
step.5_desc: Complete the payment to secure your spot and unlock documents, forms, and next steps.
step.6_desc: Pay the university application fee to advance with the submission of your process.
step.7_desc: Submit the requested documents to complete your application package.
step.8a_desc: Your letter is now available. Access the final documents to follow the team's guidance.
step.8b_desc: Track form generation, digital signature, and final package submission.
step.8_desc_accepted: Your letter is now available. Access the final documents to follow the team's instructions.
step.8_desc_forms: Track the generation of forms, digital signature, and submission of the final package.

overview.welcome_sub: Manage your application journey with Migma
overview.card_profile_sub: Keep your information up to date
overview.empty_desc: Start your journey by browsing and applying for scholarships.
overview.profile_complete_cta: Complete your profile to unlock more opportunities
overview.tip_1: Apply early to increase your chances of success
overview.tip_2: Tailor your applications for each scholarship
overview.tip_3: Keep your profile updated with your latest achievements

applications.title: My Applications
applications.subtitle: Track the progress of all your scholarship applications.
applications.empty_desc: Start applying for scholarships to track your progress here. We'll help you find the best opportunities that match your profile.

documents.title: Pending Documents
documents.subtitle: List of documents requested by the system or the Migma team.
documents.empty_desc: Global documents will appear here after Placement Fee confirmation or when the Migma team requests something specific.
documents.sub: List of documents requested by the system or the Migma team.

forms.title: Forms to Sign
forms.subtitle_empty: Review and sign the forms generated for your application.
forms.subtitle: Download each PDF, sign outside the portal, and upload the signed file.
forms.empty_desc_paid: Payment has been confirmed. Forms will appear here as soon as they are generated by the team.
forms.empty_desc_pending: Forms will be released after approval and payment of the Placement Fee.
forms.file_input_desc: Upload the PDF signed digitally, scanned, or photographed.
forms.upload_success_desc: Confirm below that this is the form signed by you. After confirmation, it will be marked as signed in your process.
forms.sub: Review and sign the forms generated for your application.
forms.sub_desc: Download each PDF, sign it outside the portal, and upload the signed file.
forms.modal_signed_desc: Upload the digitally signed, scanned, or photographed PDF.
forms.modal_upload_confirm_desc: Confirm below that this is the form signed by you. After confirmation, it will be marked as signed in your process.

profile.title: Student Profile
profile.subtitle: Personal and academic data used in the scholarship process.
profile.completion_subtitle: Complete your profile to improve scholarship matching.
profile.completion_tip: A complete profile improves recommendation accuracy.
profile.missing_desc: This data helps find scholarships more compatible with your profile.

placeholder.supplemental_data_desc: Section 11.4 form. Will be connected to the data required to fill university forms.

hero.title: Work with MIGMA from anywhere in the world
hero.description: Join the MIGMA Global Partner Program and collaborate with us as a Global Independent Contractor Partner.
hero.apply_button: Apply to Become a Global Partner

benefits.title: Work with freedom and earn in USD
benefits.description: Join a global team of talented professionals and enjoy the benefits of working remotely with competitive compensation.
benefits.benefit1_desc: Competitive compensation paid in US Dollars, regardless of your location.
benefits.benefit2_desc: Complete freedom to work from anywhere. All you need is a reliable internet connection.
benefits.benefit3_desc: You must have a valid business entity (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent) to invoice us.

who_is_it_for.title: Who is the MIGMA Global Partner Program for?
who_is_it_for.description: We are looking for ambitious people and companies who want to work with MIGMA as independent contractors and help us expand globally.
who_is_it_for.point1: You live in Brazil, Portugal, Angola, Mozambique, Cape Verde or any other country.
who_is_it_for.point2: You have (or are able to obtain) a valid business or tax registration (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent).
who_is_it_for.point3: You are comfortable working with clients, sales, service, operations or consulting.
who_is_it_for.point4: You are open to being paid per result, commission or project.
who_is_it_for.point5: You like the idea of growing with an international ecosystem instead of a traditional job.
who_is_it_for.point6: You like to receive payments in USD.
who_is_it_for.point7: You enjoy working with the United States visa process.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.description: Join our global team in four simple steps
how_it_works.step1_desc: Submit your application with your professional details.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our team reviews your experience and qualifications.
how_it_works.step3_desc: A brief call to discuss your fit and opportunities.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Get set up with our systems and start working.

form.title: Apply to become a MIGMA Global Partner
form.description: Tell us more about you, your experience and why you want to work with MIGMA. If your profile matches what we are looking for, you will receive an email to schedule an interview.
form.cv_dropzone_text: Click to upload or drag and drop
form.file_too_large: File too large. Please reduce the file size to under 3MB. Current size: {{size}}MB
form.info_accurate_label: I confirm that all the information provided is true and accurate. *
form.marketing_consent_label: I agree to receive relevant updates and opportunities from MIGMA by email.

wizard.has_business_label: Do you have a valid business or tax registration (CNPJ, NIF or equivalent)? *
wizard.current_occupation_placeholder: e.g., Visa Consultant, Sales Closer, Assistant, Student, Administrator
wizard.expertise_label: Area of Expertise * (Select all that apply)
wizard.specify_expertise: Please specify your area of expertise *
wizard.roles_label: Which role(s) are you interested in? (multi-select)
wizard.visa_experience_label: Do you have experience with U.S. visa processes? *
wizard.client_experience_label: Do you have experience working with clients, sales or business development? *
wizard.client_experience_desc_label: Please briefly describe your experience working with clients, sales or business development *
wizard.why_migma_label: Why do you want to work with MIGMA as a Global Partner? *
wizard.contractor_acknowledgement: I understand that this is not an employment offer and that the collaboration with MIGMA is as an independent contractor. *

validation.email_exists: This email is already registered. Please use a different email address.
validation.client_exp_required: Please select if you have client experience
validation.oth_exp_required: Please specify your area of expertise
validation.why_migma_min: Please tell us more about why you want to join (minimum 10 characters)
validation.acknowledge_contractor: You must acknowledge the contractor status
validation.cv_upload_error: Failed to upload CV. Please try again.
validation.duplicate_email: This email already has a pending application.
validation.submission_error: Failed to submit application. Please try again.

role_options.any_role_where_migma_believes_i_am_a_goo: Any role where MIGMA believes I am a good fit

testimonials.title: What our partners say
testimonials.description: Join a community of talented professionals who have found success working with MIGMA as Global Partners.
testimonials.testimonial1_text: Working with MIGMA as a Global Partner has been an incredible experience. The flexibility and support are unmatched.
testimonials.testimonial2_text: The opportunity to work remotely while earning in USD has transformed my career. Highly recommend joining the program.
testimonials.testimonial3_text: MIGMA's Global Partner Program offers the perfect balance of independence and collaboration.
testimonials.testimonial4_text: As a contractor, I appreciate the professional structure and competitive compensation MIGMA provides.
testimonials.testimonial5_text: The onboarding process was smooth, and the team is always available to help. Great experience overall.
testimonials.testimonial6_text: Working with MIGMA has opened doors to exciting projects I wouldn't have access to otherwise.
testimonials.testimonial7_text: The freedom to work from anywhere combined with USD payments makes this program ideal for global professionals.
testimonials.testimonial8_text: MIGMA values quality work and provides the resources needed to deliver exceptional results.
testimonials.testimonial9_text: Being part of MIGMA's global network has expanded my professional horizons significantly.

cta.title: Ready to join our global team?
cta.description: Start your journey as a MIGMA Global Partner and work with freedom, earn in USD, and collaborate with a world-class team.
